docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,193.00 FILED BY VYGANTAS, GARRETT AS TO DEFENDANT ARBORIST NOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEAN CLAUDE ROCHAT, CEO FILED BY DEFENDANT ARBORIST NOW
ORDER OF CONTINAUNCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-18-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GARRETT VYGANTAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARBORIST NOW IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEAN CLAUDE ROCHAT, CEO FILED BY DEFENDANT ARBORIST NOW
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-19-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GARRETT VYGANTAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARBORIST NOW, REPRESENTED BY JEAN CLAUDE ROCHAT, CEO IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,146.50 INCLUDING COSTS. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AND A JUDGMENT MAY BE ISSUED AT THAT TIME. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506) (FILE RETINED IN DEPT. 506 TICKLER FILE)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$AMOUNT NOT GIVEN) SERVED JUN-29-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARBORIST NOW
